title: Selling PDF Guides Without Gumroad: What Nobody Tells You Before You Choose — No PayPal Required
author: Unchained Commerce
excerpt: PayPal and Stripe block creators in dozens of countries. Here is the infrastructure that works everywhere they don't.

content.text: Imagine you're a digital creator from Nigeria trying to sell your PDF guides on Gumroad, but their system flags your account due to 'geographic restrictions.' You're not alone. PayPal, Stripe, and other major platforms exclude countries like Nigeria, Ghana, and Pakistan from their services. This leaves you with a big problem: how to sell your digital products without getting locked out of the platform. In this post, we'll explore your options, the trade-offs, and why some alternatives are better than others.
What Each Option Actually Offers

Gumroad and other platforms promise to be 'global' and 'inclusive,' but the reality is that they often rely on third-party payment processors like PayPal, which in turn enforce their own set of rules and restrictions. This means that even if you're allowed to sell on the platform, you may still be limited by the payment processor's terms. In contrast, Core Shop Engine is a self-contained backend solution that handles payment verification, automated delivery, and PDF receipts without relying on any external payment processors. This makes it possible to sell your digital products without getting locked out of the platform.
How They Handle Restricted Countries

The 'geographic restrictions' imposed by platforms like Gumroad and PayPal are not just technical hurdles – they often reflect deeper economic and political realities. In some cases, these restrictions may be rooted in legitimate concerns about money laundering or terrorism financing, while in others, they may be the result of outdated or biased policies. Whatever the reason, as a digital creator, you need a solution that can bypass these restrictions and get you paid. Core Shop Engine is designed to work everywhere, even in countries where major platforms have been blocked.
Payment Speed, Fees, and Real Costs

When it comes to payment speed, fees, and real costs, the differences between the various options are stark. Platforms like Gumroad charge transaction fees that can range from 3.5% to 8.5%, depending on the payment method and country. In contrast, Core Shop Engine charges a flat rate of $49.99, which includes all the features and functionality you need to sell your digital products. This means that you can keep more of the revenue from your sales, without sacrificing convenience or flexibility.
Gumroad's geographic restrictions are not just a technical issue – they often reflect deeper economic and political realities.
Automation and Delivery Capabilities

Automation and delivery capabilities are critical for any digital creator looking to scale their business. Platforms like Gumroad offer some basic automation features, but they often require you to set up and manage multiple payment processors, invoices, and delivery channels. Core Shop Engine, on the other hand, includes a full backend solution with bot engine, automated delivery, and payment verification, making it easy to set up and manage your sales funnel.
Which One to Choose Based on Your Situation

Ultimately, the choice between Gumroad and Core Shop Engine depends on your specific situation and needs. If you're looking for a 'global' platform that can handle multiple payment processors and currencies, then Gumroad may be a good option. However, if you're looking for a self-contained backend solution that can bypass geographic restrictions and get you paid faster, without sacrificing convenience or flexibility, then Core Shop Engine is the better choice.
How do I sell digital products if PayPal is not available in my country?

The direct answer is NOWPayments combined with the Core Shop Engine. NOWPayments is a crypto payment processor that requires no KYC from merchants and no account creation from buyers. It supports over 300 coins and sends a webhook to your backend when a payment confirms on-chain. The Core Shop Engine receives that webhook, verifies the transaction, generates a receipt, and delivers the product automatically. The key difference between this and a platform workaround is that it is not a workaround — it is a different infrastructure layer entirely. There is no platform that can suspend your access, no compliance team that can flag your account, and no payout schedule that delays your revenue. Your funds go directly to a wallet you control the moment a transaction confirms.
Core Shop Engine is a self-contained backend solution that can bypass geographic restrictions and get you paid faster.
